metadata.description: Standalone marketplace for the EDPA plugin. Lets maintainers run `/plugin marketplace add /path/to/edpa/plugin` for local dogfooding without going through the technomaton-hub indirection.

plugins.name: edpa
plugins.description: EDPA — Evidence-Driven Proportional Allocation. Derive hours from Git delivery evidence. Zero timesheets, Monte Carlo calibrated CW weights, bidirectional sync with GitHub Projects.
